title: trisetum johnstonii subsp. matthei
intro: Trisetum johnstonii subsp. matthei, also known as Matthei's Trisetum, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trisetum johnstonii subsp. matthei include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Trisetum johnstonii subsp. matthei is typically prepared as a tea or infusion for its medicinal uses, and it has also been used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
